title: Exemptions
doc_html:
§142.  Exemptions

Nothing in this Part shall apply to agricultural products or live stock while in the hands of the producer or raiser, or affect any combination of laborers for the purpose of procuring an increase of their wages or redress of grievances.
doc_text:
§142.  Exemptions
Nothing in this Part shall apply to agricultural products or live stock while in the hands of the producer or raiser, or affect any combination of laborers for the purpose of procuring an increase of their wages or redress of grievances.
